text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 79 

RA_OA 

LABEL: Rheumatoid Arthritis / Osteoarthritis End-of-Year Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the Chronic Condition Warehouse (CCW) criteria for 
rheumatoid arthritis/osteoarthritis as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: RA_OA 

LONG NAME: RA_OA 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 0 =
